cards.front: What is the time complexity of Heap Sort?
What is a Heap Data Structure?
cards.back: A complete binary tree where each parent node is either greater than (max heap) or less than (min heap) its child nodes

cards.front: What is the purpose of Heapify in a Binary Heap?
cards.back: To rearrange the binary heap into the heap property (i.e., the parent node is either greater than or less than its child nodes)

cards.front: What is the key concept in Balanced Search Trees?
cards.back: Balancing factor, also known as the height difference between the left and right subtrees of a node
A comparison-based sorting algorithm that uses a binary heap data structure and is known for its simplicity and efficiency
